mapper.select: SELECT config_key, config_value, value_type, description, updated_at FROM system_config ORDER BY config_key ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO system_config ( config_key, config_value, value_type, description ) VALUES (#{configKey}, #{configValue}, #{valueType}, #{description}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE config_value = VALUES(config_value), value_type = VALUES(value_type), description = VALUES(description), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3)
